roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET APD PRCS PC3455/3455ADV/3455ADM/3455REIN//CAL:SENTENCING RE: PRCS ADMISSION OF VIOLATION/CH1:CJ 60D/CTS:9/CTORD:THE BALANCE OF THE CUSTODY TIME IS SUSPENDED SO THAT THE DEFENDANT CAN REPORT TO CASC TO ENROLL IN & PARTICIPATE IN THINKING FOR A CHANGE FOR APERIOD OF 3,5 MONTHS, OR UNTIL HE COMPLETES THE PROGRAM/OR/CTORD:PRCS IS NOW EXTENDED TO & THROUGH 12-14-20/
